Headline: #4 Cottage Grove Temporary Reroute at Cottage Grove/83rd
ShortDescription: 4 Cottage Grove buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Cottage Grove/83rd.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#4 Cottage Grove buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Cottage Grove, 83rd, King Drive, 79th, Cottage Grove and over normal route, due to street blockage near Cottage Grove/83rd.

Allow extra travel time.
